content:
Could a list of human translated chapters/stories be pinned in the mistranslation channel for English? Just to have a complete source of all the human translated content to reference before making suggestions? I find myself not sure what is completely translated or not when seeing errors, and dont want to suggest changes in portions of the text that isnt human translated.

I have found these https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1433513650299076780/1452684290952265778 https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1433513650299076780/1452684700517662720, which should up to date as of 2 weeks ago, with the addition of Arc 2 Chapter 1, which was human translated very recently
